name: skybzm
description: SkyBZM - Hypixel Skyblock Bazaar Flipper Bot

scripts.web:build: cd src/web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:win: npm run web:build && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --compress GZip --output dist/SkyBZM-win.exe
scripts.build:linux: npm run web:build && pkg . --targets node18-linux-x64 --compress GZip --output dist/SkyBZM-linux
scripts.build:mac: npm run web:build && pkg . --targets node18-macos-x64 --compress GZip --output dist/SkyBZM-macos
scripts.build:all: npm run web:build && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64,node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64 --compress GZip --out-path dist
